name: CRISPR-Cas12a SARS-CoV-2 (ORF1ab)
shortDescription: LbCas12a detection of SARS-CoV-2 targeting ORF1ab, with RT-RPA pre-amplification and fluorescent or lateral-flow readout. SARS-CoV-2 is an RNA virus; it is reverse-transcribed during RT-RPA so Cas12a detects the resulting dsDNA amplicon. Sequences from Xiong et al., PLOS Biology 2020 (open access).

amplification.kit: TwistAmp Basic (recombinase polymerase amplification) with reverse transcriptase

primers.name: ORF1ab-F5
primers.notes: Selected as the optimal ORF1ab forward primer (F5+R1 pair) after screening F1-F5/R1-R5.

amplification.notes: RT-RPA reverse-transcribes the viral RNA and isothermally amplifies the ORF1ab segment to dsDNA, which LbCas12a then detects directly (no T7 transcription step, unlike Cas13a SHERLOCK assays).

reporter.readout: Fluorescence (plate reader / blue-light transilluminator); lateral-flow strip variant available
reporter.notes: Activated LbCas12a collaterally cleaves the ssDNA reporter. Fluorescence reporter: FAM-TTATT-BHQ1. Lateral-flow variant: FAM-TTATT-Biotin (ssDNA-FB).

workflowSteps.title: Extract viral RNA
workflowSteps.description: Extract total RNA from the clinical sample.

workflowSteps.title: RT-RPA amplification
workflowSteps.description: Combine sample RNA with RPA reagents + reverse transcriptase and ORF1ab-F5/R1 primers. Incubate isothermally to produce dsDNA amplicon.

workflowSteps.title: Cas12a detection
workflowSteps.description: Add RPA product to LbCas12a + crRNA-ORF1ab + ssDNA reporter. Target recognition activates collateral ssDNA cleavage.

workflowSteps.title: Read result
workflowSteps.description: Measure fluorescence, or dip a lateral-flow strip (positive = test line).

validation.specificity: Designed for SARS-CoV-2 specificity; no cross-reactivity reported against tested controls.
validation.crossReactivity: No false positives among 11 negative clinical samples.
validation.validatedOn: 22 nasopharyngeal swab clinical samples (11 positive, 11 negative); 100% concordance with RT-qPCR.

provenance.source: Rapid detection of SARS-CoV-2 with CRISPR-Cas12a
provenance.notes: Sequences transcribed verbatim from S1 Table (Primers, crRNAs, and reporters).
